nasb.text: I consider it right, as long as I am in this earthly dwelling, to stir you up by way of reminder,

esv.text: I think it right, as long as I am in this body,  to stir you up by way of reminder,

cnv.text: 趁著我還在世上的時候，我認為應當提醒你們，使你們常常警醒，

ccb.text: 我觉得应当趁着我还在世的时候提醒你们，激励你们，

csbs.text: 我认为，只要我还在这帐篷里，就理当用提醒的话来激发你们，
